author: Eli Stevens
message: Add errata from the manning site, clarify
patch:
commit d6c0210143daa133bbdeddaffc8993b1e17b5174 Author: Eli Stevens Date: Mon Dec 28 16:06:43 2020 -0800 Add errata from the manning site, clarify --- docs/errata.html | 8 ++++++++ 1 file changed, 8 insertions(+) diff --git a/docs/errata.html b/docs/errata.html index 4b28b49..466d790 100644 --- a/docs/errata.html +++ b/docs/errata.html @@ -196,6 +196,14 @@ o11 = i11 * w00 + i12 * w01 + i13 * w02 + flagged as nodules.

+

Page 272

+

Delete the two text snippets "1((CO10-1))" and "1((CO10-2))" from Listing 10.12.

+
+    candidate_t,
+    pos_t,
+
+

The code annotation "This is our training sample." should cover those two lines as well.

+

Page 277

The first code annotation should read:

author: Eli Stevens
patch:
commit b59272f52f00959c86a875ef0385b00c7e4dca70 Author: Eli Stevens Date: Mon Dec 28 15:58:48 2020 -0800 Update errata formatting. --- docs/errata.html | 8 +++++--- 1 file changed, 5 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-) diff --git a/docs/errata.html b/docs/errata.html index bdaf4f4..4b28b49 100644 --- a/docs/errata.html +++ b/docs/errata.html @@ -199,9 +199,11 @@ o11 = i11 * w00 + i12 * w01 + i13 * w02 +

Page 277

The first code annotation should read:

- # In[7]: - from p2ch10.vis import findPositiveSamples, showCandidate - positiveSample_list = findPositiveSamples() +

+# In[7]:
+from p2ch10.vis import findPositiveSamples, showCandidate
+positiveSample_list = findPositiveSamples()
+

author: Eli Stevens
message: Rename train_cls and train_seg to training.
patch:
commit 7c6f2249e40e0a37ebbcae0a7c8619fc8adf75c8
Author: Eli Stevens <wickedgrey@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon Dec 28 15:56:45 2020 -0800

    Rename train_cls and train_seg to training.
---
 p2_run_everything.ipynb      | 2 +-
 p2ch13_explore_data.ipynb    | 6 +++---
 p2ch13_explore_data_v2.ipynb | 2 +-
 3 files changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

diff --git a/p2_run_everything.ipynb b/p2_run_everything.ipynb
index 3875818..560b04d 100644
--- a/p2_run_everything.ipynb
+++ b/p2_run_everything.ipynb
@@ -210,7 +210,7 @@
    "metadata": {},
    "outputs": [],
    "source": [
-    "run('p2ch13.train_cls.LunaTrainingApp', f'--epochs={final_epochs}', '--balanced', '--augmented', 'final-cls')"
+    "run('p2ch13.training.LunaTrainingApp', f'--epochs={final_epochs}', '--balanced', '--augmented', 'final-cls')"
    ]
   },
   {
diff --git a/p2ch13_explore_data.ipynb b/p2ch13_explore_data.ipynb
index 55a76f7..c702064 100644
--- a/p2ch13_explore_data.ipynb
+++ b/p2ch13_explore_data.ipynb
@@ -427,15 +427,15 @@
       "\u001b[1;31mModuleNotFoundError\u001b[0m: No module named 'tensorboard.summary.writer'",
       "\nDuring handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:\n",
       "\u001b[1;31mImportError\u001b[0m                               Traceback (most recent call last)",
-      "\u001b[1;32m<ipython-input-10-abc7b5a55224>\u001b[0m in \u001b[0;36m<module>\u001b[1;34m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[1;32m----> 1\u001b[1;33m \u001b[1;32mfrom\u001b[0m \u001b[0mp2ch13\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0mtrain_cls\u001b[0m \u001b[1;32mimport\u001b[0m \u001b[0mLunaTrainingApp\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0m\u001b[0;32m      2\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      3\u001b[0m \u001b[0mcls_app\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m=\u001b[0m \u001b[0mLunaTrainingApp\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m(\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m[\u001b[0m\u001b[1;34m'--augmented'\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m,\u001b[0m \u001b[1;34m'--balanced'\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m]\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m)\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      4\u001b[0m \u001b[0mtrain_dl\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m=\u001b[0m \u001b[0mcls_app\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0minitTrainDl\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m(\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m)\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      5\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n",
-      "\u001b[1;32m~\\linux-home\\edit\\book\\code\\p2ch13\\train_cls.py\u001b[0m in \u001b[0;36m<module>\u001b[1;34m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      7\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      8\u001b[0m \u001b[1;31m# tag::tensorboardX[]\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[1;32m----> 9\u001b[1;33m \u001b[1;32mfrom\u001b[0m \u001b[0mtorch\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0mutils\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0mtensorboard\u001b[0m \u001b[1;32mimport\u001b[0m \u001b[0mSummaryWriter\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0m\u001b[0;32m     10\u001b[0m \u001b[1;31m# end::tensorboardX[]\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m     11\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n",
+      "\u001b[1;32m<ipython-input-10-abc7b5a55224>\u001b[0m in \u001b[0;36m<module>\u001b[1;34m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[1;32m----> 1\u001b[1;33m \u001b[1;32mfrom\u001b[0m \u001b[0mp2ch13\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0mtraining\u001b[0m \u001b[1;32mimport\u001b[0m \u001b[0mLunaTrainingApp\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0m\u001b[0;32m      2\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      3\u001b[0m \u001b[0mcls_app\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m=\u001b[0m \u001b[0mLunaTrainingApp\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m(\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m[\u001b[0m\u001b[1;34m'--augmented'\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m,\u001b[0m \u001b[1;34m'--balanced'\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m]\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m)\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      4\u001b[0m \u001b[0mtrain_dl\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m=\u001b[0m \u001b[0mcls_app\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0minitTrainDl\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m(\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m)\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      5\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n",
+      "\u001b[1;32m~\\linux-home\\edit\\book\\code\\p2ch13\\training.py\u001b[0m in \u001b[0;36m<module>\u001b[1;34m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      7\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      8\u001b[0m \u001b[1;31m# tag::tensorboardX[]\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[1;32m----> 9\u001b[1;33m \u001b[1;32mfrom\u001b[0m \u001b[0mtorch\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0mutils\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0mtensorboard\u001b[0m \u001b[1;32mimport\u001b[0m \u001b[0mSummaryWriter\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0m\u001b[0;32m     10\u001b[0m \u001b[1;31m# end::tensorboardX[]\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m     11\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[1;32m~\\Miniconda3\\envs\\book\\lib\\site-packages\\torch\\utils\\tensorboard\\__init__.py\u001b[0m in \u001b[0;36m<module>\u001b[1;34m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      2\u001b[0m     \u001b[1;32mfrom\u001b[0m \u001b[0mtensorboard\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0msummary\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0mwriter\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0mrecord_writer\u001b[0m \u001b[1;32mimport\u001b[0m \u001b[0mRecordWriter\u001b[0m  \u001b[1;31m# noqa F401\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[0;32m      3\u001b[0m \u001b[1;32mexcept\u001b[0m \u001b[0mImportError\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m:\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n\u001b[1;32m----> 4\u001b[1;33m     raise ImportError('TensorBoard logging requires TensorBoard with Python summary writer installed. '\n\u001b[0m\u001b[0;32m      5\u001b[0m                       'This should be available in 1.14 or above.')\n\u001b[0;32m      6\u001b[0m \u001b[1;32mfrom\u001b[0m \u001b[1;33m.\u001b[0m\u001b[0mwriter\u001b[0m \u001b[1;32mimport\u001b[0m \u001b[0mFileWriter\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m,\u001b[0m \u001b[0mSummaryWriter\u001b[0m  \u001b[1;31m# noqa F401\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[1;33m\u001b[0m\u001b[0m\n",
       "\u001b[1;31mImportError\u001b[0m: TensorBoard logging requires TensorBoard with Python summary writer installed. This should be available in 1.14 or above."
      ]
     }
    ],
    "source": [
-    "from p2ch13.train_cls import LunaTrainingApp\n",
+    "from p2ch13.training import LunaTrainingApp\n",
     "\n",
     "cls_app = LunaTrainingApp(['--augmented', '--balanced'])\n",
     "train_dl = cls_app.initTrainDl()\n",
